given: An isolated Personal Agent store, scheduler, and stable pa-cli cron capability
when: The main Agent creates, verifies, and later triggers a recurring reminder
acceptance: The schedules capability is registered as implemented and the Personal Agent Skill routes reminder requests through pa-cli cron
A scheduled task persists its cron expression, IANA timezone, prompt, enabled state and next run, and the Agent verifies mutations by listing persisted schedules
Schedules reject intervals shorter than fifteen minutes
A due schedule creates a normal local task and records its execution without depending on Cloud
